subject: A dark horned demonic creature being seized and restrained by a swarm of pale spectral hands reaching up from below
description: A snarling, dark-skinned horned creature with claws and a fanged maw is being mobbed by dozens of pale, ghostly humanoid hands that surge up from beneath it. The hands clutch its arms, shoulders, horns, and torso, immobilizing it like a living cage. The creature's posture is contorted — head turned, mouth open in a roar or grimace — as the grasping hands pin it in place. The palette is dominated by cool whites and pale grays for the hands against the near-black silhouette of the creature, with subtle pinkish highlights on the fingers.
foreground: Dark horned creature being grabbed by many pale grasping hands
background: Indistinct pale void filled with more reaching hands and faint shadow
emotion: panicked, snarling, overwhelmed — the creature is struggling against the restraint
